sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Siebert Financial and Newsmax Expand Strategic Partnership Through Financial Programming and National Advertising Campaign
feed.summary: Siebert Financial Corp. announced an expanded strategic partnership with Newsmax, integrating Siebert's financial expertise into dedicated programming and a national advertising campaign. This collaboration aims to deliver relevant financial content to Newsmax's audience, enhance Siebert's brand visibility, and facilitate broader market awareness. Siebert professionals will appear on "American Agenda" to provide market insights, supported by a significant advertising investment across Newsmax platforms.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings; Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) shows 0% ownership
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an amended Schedule 13G for Amazon.com Inc, reporting 0 shares and 0% beneficial ownership. This change is due to an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026, where certain Vanguard subsidiaries and business divisions will now report holdings separately under SEC Release No. 34-39538. The amendment clarifies a reporting allocation change, not a sale of underlying assets, meaning investors should look for individual subsidiary filings for Amazon holdings.

feed.title: First Solar Inc Stock: Navigating Solar Sector Headwinds Amid Policy Shifts and Earnings Pressure
feed.summary: First Solar Inc is facing investor scrutiny after missing Q4 2025 earnings and lowering FY 2026 guidance due to permitting delays and policy shifts. The company, a leader in thin-film solar modules, relies on its proprietary CdTe technology and U.S. manufacturing to capitalize on domestic content incentives. Despite market volatility and competitive pressures, its strategic focus on utility-scale projects and alignment with North American energy independence goals present long-term growth potential for investors.

feed.title: 3M leads 11 Minnesota companies on Fortune's innovation list, but most slip in rankings
feed.summary: 3M Co. led 11 Minnesota firms on Fortune's list of America's Most Innovative Companies, ranking 37th overall, a drop from its 15th position last year. Most other Minnesota companies on the list also saw their rankings slip, with only U.S. Bancorp improving its position. The article highlights that 3M, known for products like Scotch Tape and Post-It notes, still holds a significant spot despite the decline.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings after realignment (MO)
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group filed an amendment to its Schedule 13G/A, reporting zero beneficial ownership of Altria Group Inc. common stock. This change follows an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026, where several Vanguard subsidiaries will now report their holdings separately. As a result, Vanguard no longer beneficially owns these reclassified securities.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings; ARE ownership shown as 0 (ARE)
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group filed an Amendment No. 21 Schedule 13G/A for Alexandria Real Estate Equities Inc (ARE), reporting 0% beneficial ownership as of March 13, 2026. This change is due to an internal realignment where certain Vanguard subsidiaries and business divisions will now report their holdings separately, in reliance on SEC Release No. 34-39538. Investors should anticipate subsequent Schedule 13 filings from Vanguard-affiliated entities to disclose the actual positions previously reported under Vanguard's umbrella.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings; ALGN shows 0% ownership after realignment
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group filed an amended Schedule 13G for Align Technology Inc (ALGN), reporting 0% beneficial ownership following an internal realignment on January 12, 2026. This realignment means certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report their ownership separately, based on SEC Release No. 34-39538. The filing explicitly states Vanguard itself holds no voting or dispositive power over ALGN shares as of March 13, 2026.

feed.title: Vanguard Group (NYSE: ALL) reports 0 shares; subsidiaries disaggregate ownership
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group filed an amended Schedule 13G/A, reporting zero shares of Allstate Corp Common Stock and 0% ownership. This change is due to an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026, where certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report their beneficial ownership separately in reliance on SEC Release No. 34-39538. The filing indicates Vanguard no longer has sole or shared voting or dispositive power over these shares.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings for Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOG), reports 0 shares
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group filed an amended Schedule 13G/A for Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ: GOOG), reporting 0 shares beneficially owned and 0% of the class. This change is due to an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026, where certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report beneficial ownership separately, as per SEC Release No. 34-39538. The filing clarifies a reporting reclassification rather than an economic transaction or sale of shares.

feed.title: Stryker reportedly brings most services affected by cyberattack back online
feed.summary: Stryker has largely restored its services following a recent cyberattack. Both Bloomberg and Reuters reported that the company confirmed manufacturing is ramping up and electronic ordering systems are back online. The cyberattack, attributed to the Iran-backed group Handala, had previously forced the company to shut down operations globally and disrupted various functions.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings; reports 0 shares of Air Products (NYSE: APD)
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group filed an amendment to its Schedule 13G/A, reporting 0 shares and 0% beneficial ownership of Air Products and Chemicals Inc common stock. This change is due to an internal realignment on January 12, 2026, which caused certain Vanguard subsidiaries to report their holdings separately. The filing does not indicate any intention to buy or sell APD shares, but rather reflects a change in reporting structure.

feed.title: Alphabet Relies on AI to Boost Search Growth: More Upside Ahead?
feed.summary: Alphabet's Search business is leveraging AI, particularly Gemini 3 integration, to enhance user engagement and drive growth, maintaining a dominant market share. Despite strong competition from Microsoft's Bing and Baidu's AI-powered tools, Alphabet reports increased query length and conversational sessions through its AI Mode. While the company's shares have underperformed and its valuation is at a premium, its 2026 earnings are projected to grow by 7.3%.

feed.title: South Carolina oks Duke Energy plan for natural gas plant. What's next?
feed.summary: South Carolina regulators have unanimously approved Duke Energy's plan to build a 1,400-megawatt natural gas plant in Starr, despite opposition from some residents and environmental groups concerned about health and environmental impacts. Duke Energy claims the plant is crucial for meeting growing energy demands, will use modern technology to control emissions, and is projected to generate significant tax revenue for local school districts. The company will now seek tax incentives from the Anderson County Council.

feed.title: Vanguard subsidiaries disaggregate holdings; AFL parent reports 0 shares (AFL)
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A report indicating zero beneficial ownership of Aflac Inc common stock. This change is due to an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026, which will lead certain Vanguard subsidiaries to report their holdings separately, in accordance with SEC Release No. 34-39538. The filing was signed by Ashley Grim on March 26, 2026.

feed.title: Las Vegas Sands Corp Stock: Valuation Insights and Strategic Positioning in Global Gaming Markets
feed.summary: Las Vegas Sands Corp (LVS) operates integrated resorts primarily in Macao and Singapore, with its stock drawing attention from North American investors for exposure to global gaming and hospitality growth. The company showcases resilience through its dominant Asian footprint and properties like Marina Bay Sands, though valuation opinions are mixed, with analysts leaning towards a "Moderate Buy" rating. Key factors for investors include LVS's strategic assets, financial resilience, and the risks associated with geopolitical tensions and economic slowdowns in Asia.

feed.title: Jack Henry & Associates Secures $1.0 Billion Five-Year Revolving Credit Facility
feed.summary: Jack Henry & Associates has secured a new $1.0 billion five-year unsecured revolving credit facility with U.S. Bank and a syndicate of lenders, replacing its previous $600 million facility. The new agreement, effective March 25, 2026, supports refinancing, capital spending, share repurchases, and general corporate purposes. The prior agreement was terminated early without penalty, with approximately $80 million outstanding refinanced into the new facility.

feed.title: [SCHEDULE 13G/A] AES CO...
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group filed an Amendment No. 14 to Schedule 13G/A for AES Corp Common Stock, reporting zero beneficial ownership (0%) after an internal realignment on January 12, 2026. This realignment disaggregated certain Vanguard subsidiaries and business divisions, which will now report beneficial ownership separately. The filing confirms that The Vanguard Group no longer holds beneficial ownership over securities owned by these disaggregated entities.

feed.title: Jack Henry (NASDAQ: JKHY) adds $1.0B five-year credit facility
feed.summary: Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. (NASDAQ: JKHY) has secured a new five-year, $1.0 billion revolving unsecured credit facility, replacing its previous $600 million agreement. This new facility offers increased borrowing capacity for general corporate purposes, including refinancing debt, capital expenditures, and equity repurchases. The agreement includes variable interest rates tied to Term SOFR or an alternate base rate, plus customary covenants and guarantees from its wholly-owned material domestic subsidiaries.

feed.title: Huntington Ingalls (HII) shares significantly higher after Jim Cramer said "It's a buy"
feed.summary: Shares of Huntington Ingalls Industries (HII) saw a significant increase following Jim Cramer's endorsement on CNBC's "Mad Money," where he declared the stock a buy. This positive recommendation from the influential financial commentator likely contributed to the upward movement in HII's stock price.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings; ABT shows 0 shares (ABT)
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group filed an amended Schedule 13G/A for Abbott Laboratories, indicating an internal realignment where Vanguard and its subsidiaries will now report beneficial ownership separately. This filing states that Vanguard's beneficial ownership in Abbott Laboratories is now 0 shares, representing 0% of the class, effective March 13, 2026. This change is due to the disaggregation of holdings following an internal realignment within Vanguard.

feed.title: Cintas Named in Forbes Best-in-State Companies
feed.summary: Cintas Corporation has been recognized on Forbes' 2026 America’s Best-in-State Companies list, an inaugural ranking that evaluated companies within their respective states. Based in Cincinnati, Cintas was one of only 25 Ohio companies to make the list, out of approximately 5,000 U.S.-headquartered companies assessed. This award

feed.title: Court gives Stellantis, Ford access to inventory in Iowa dealership group floorplan fraud case
feed.summary: A court has granted Stellantis and Ford access to inventory in a floorplan fraud case involving an Iowa dealership group. The dealership owners, Alex, Igor, and Yelena Tovstanovsky, who are connected to dealerships selling Stellantis, Ford, and Chevrolet vehicles and named in Stellantis’ litigation, filed Chapter 11 bankruptcy petitions on March 20.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings for Travelers (NYSE: TRV) after realignment
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has disaggregated its holdings in Travelers (NYSE: TRV), reporting 0 shares and 0% beneficial ownership following an internal realignment. This change is in reliance on SEC Release No. 34-39538, meaning certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report their holdings separately. The amendment clarifies a reporting structure change rather than an economic transaction.

feed.title: RTX (RTX) stock up significantly after Jim Cramer said it’s the best of the lot
feed.summary: The article discusses the significant stock increase of RTX (RTX) following Jim Cramer's endorsement, where he referred to it as "the best of the lot." This suggests that Cramer's positive remarks had a notable impact on investor perception and the company's stock performance.

feed.title: L3Harris (LHX) stock up significantly after Jim Cramer recommended buying the shares
feed.summary: L3Harris (LHX) stock saw a significant increase following a buy recommendation from Jim Cramer. This favorable endorsement from the well-known financial personality appears to have positively influenced investor sentiment and share price.

feed.title: Howmet Aerospace (HWM) Stock Up After Jim Cramer Recommended To Get “Exposure”
feed.summary: Howmet Aerospace (HWM) stock saw an increase after Jim Cramer, host of CNBC's "Mad Money," recommended investors get "exposure" to the specialty metals company. Cramer highlighted Howmet's potential due to its involvement in both commercial and defense aerospace industries, suggesting it could benefit from these sectors' growth.

feed.title: Horizon Kinetics (NYSE: TPL) adds 1 Texas Pacific Land share at $538.37
feed.summary: Horizon Kinetics Asset Management LLC, a significant shareholder in Texas Pacific Land Corp (NYSE: TPL), reported a minor open-market purchase of 1 share at $538.37. This transaction, filed on a Form 4, increases their direct holdings to 3,467,933 shares of TPL common stock. Despite the small size, the filing confirms Horizon Kinetics' status as a more than 10% owner of the company.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings; FIBK ownership shown as 0% (FIBK)
feed.summary: The Vanguard Group has filed an amended Schedule 13G/A for First Interstate BancSystem Inc (FIBK), reporting 0% beneficial ownership. This change follows an internal realignment effective January 12, 2026, wherein certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report their holdings separately, in reliance on SEC Release No. 34-39538. Previously aggregated ownership is now disaggregated, meaning individual subsidiaries will file their own reports.

feed.title: Abbott Labs Worker’s Wrongful Termination Suit Fails on Appeal
feed.summary: A federal appeals court has upheld the dismissal of a wrongful termination lawsuit against Abbott Laboratories Inc., filed by a former subsidiary sales manager. The court ruled that Krishnan Ghosh, who was fired during training, did not qualify as an "employee" under Minnesota's whistleblower statute because he was not yet performing services "for hire" and did not satisfy the physical presence requirement. The Eighth Circuit's decision affirmed the lower court's ruling in favor of Abbott and Cardiovascular Systems Inc.

feed.title: Honeywell (HON) Stock Up After Jim Cramer Said He Liked It
feed.summary: Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) saw its stock rise after Jim Cramer expressed his approval, even though the shares recently dipped due to concerns about shipping disruptions in the Middle East. Cramer previously considered the stock undervalued in April 2025. While acknowledging the potential of HON, the article suggests that other AI stocks might offer faster and higher returns.

feed.title: Leveraged Ether Bets Lose Steam as 2x Ether ETF Sees $5.2 Million Outflow
feed.summary: The 2x Ether ETF (ETHU) experienced a significant outflow of $5.2 million on March 20, 2026, indicating a cooling in leveraged Ether bets. This outflow, representing 0.57% of the ETF's $906.8 million AUM, follows a substantial 26.51% slide in ETH-USD over the past three months. Despite the shift in sentiment, the current technical outlook for Ether remains balanced, with traders seemingly hesitant to make aggressive moves.

feed.title: Corebridge Financial, Equitable Holdings Merge Into $1.5T AUM, AUA Behemoth
feed.summary: Corebridge Financial and Equitable Holdings have announced an all-stock merger, forming a combined company valued at $22 billion. The new entity, operating under the Equitable name, will boast $1.5 trillion in assets under management and administration across various financial services. Marc Costantini will lead the combined firm as president and CEO, with the transaction expected to close by year-end 2026.

feed.title: Northrop Grumman (NOC) Stock Up After Jim Cramer Said It Could Be Bought
feed.summary: Northrop Grumman (NOC) stock saw an increase after Jim Cramer endorsed it as a potential buy, highlighting its role as a major defense contractor. Despite a previous dip due to missed Q1 earnings and losses on its B-21 stealth bomber program, Cramer's optimism in April 2025 centered on the expectation of increased military hardware purchases from trading partners. The shares also rose following a US military operation in Iran in March.

feed.title: Lockheed Martin (LMT) Stock Up After Jim Cramer Said It Could Be Bought
feed.summary: Lockheed Martin (LMT) stock rose after Jim Cramer expressed his positive outlook on defense stocks, including LMT, in April 2025. The company's shares have seen significant gains over the past year, despite a previous earnings report showing a substantial profit drop due to a classified program charge. Cramer's sentiment was based on the idea that international trade partners might increase defense spending to improve relations with the US administration.

feed.title: Howmet Aerospace (HWM) Stock Up After Jim Cramer Recommended To Get “Exposure”
feed.summary: Howmet Aerospace (HWM) stock saw a significant increase after Jim Cramer recommended exposure to the company, citing a "raging bull market in aerospace." The company, a supplier of aerospace components, reported strong fiscal fourth-quarter earnings, beating analyst estimates for revenue and profit per share, though it had previously experienced a dip due to conservative guidance. Its shares are up 73% over the past year and 33% since Cramer's April discussion.

feed.title: GE Aerospace (GE) Stock Up After Jim Cramer Called It a “Huge Winner”
feed.summary: GE Aerospace (NYSE:GE) stock has seen significant gains, up 39% in the past year and 60% since Jim Cramer endorsed it on Mad Money in April 2025. Cramer highlighted the company's strong gross margins, large backlog, and excellent outlook following the breakup of General Electric. Despite a recent dip after a fiscal fourth-quarter earnings report, GE Aerospace exceeded analyst profit estimates and provided optimistic 2026 guidance.

feed.title: Latest CXT News - Crane NXT Announces Appointment of Jeffrey B...
feed.summary: Crane NXT (NYSE: CXT) is an industrial technology company focused on security, detection, and authentication. This page provides a news feed with updates on the company's operations, financial performance, strategic transactions, and investor events. Recent news includes the appointment of Jeffrey Benck to its Board of Directors, details on its 2026 Investor Day, Q4 and full-year 2025 results, and acquisition updates regarding Antares Vision.

feed.title: FGRO Top Holdings List & Exposure (Fidelity Fundamental Large Cap Growth ETF)
feed.summary: This article details the top holdings of the Fidelity Fundamental Large Cap Growth ETF (FGRO), revealing its significant exposure to major tech companies like NVIDIA, Microsoft, and Apple. The top 25 holdings constitute 77.72% of the fund, providing a breakdown by weight, current price, and shares held for each major company. It also mentions broader sector, geographic, industry, and currency exposure without providing extra detail.

feed.title: Alphabet Inc Class A Stock (GOOGL) Moved Down by 3.00% on Mar 26: What Signal Does It Send?
feed.summary: Alphabet Inc. (GOOGL) stock fell by 3.00% on March 26, driven by macroeconomic concerns like geopolitical anxieties and rising oil prices, alongside company-specific issues. These include a recent legal setback, increasing global regulatory scrutiny in India and Europe, and investor worries about high capital expenditures for AI infrastructure. Technical indicators also point to a sell signal for the stock.

feed.title: Builders FirstSource Inc (BLDR) Trading Down 3.1% on Mar 26
feed.summary: Shares of Builders FirstSource Inc (BLDR) dropped 3.1% in mid-day trading on March 26, reaching an intraday low of $82.60. Despite the dip, the average one-year price target from 24 analysts is $127.27, suggesting a 53.78% upside. GuruFocus estimates a fair value of $136.62, indicating a potential upside of 65.08% for the stock.

feed.title: Promising Hotel Stocks To Research - March 26th
feed.summary: MarketBeat's stock screener has identified five promising hotel stocks for investors to research: Marriott (MAR), Hilton (HLT), MGM Resorts (MGM), Host Hotels & Resorts (HST), and Las Vegas Sands (LVS). These companies, representing various hotel business models including traditional chains, casino-resorts, and lodging REITs, were selected due to their recent high dollar trading volume among hotel stocks. The article emphasizes that hotel stocks are cyclical and influenced by factors such as travel demand, economic growth, seasonality, and interest rates.

feed.title: PepsiCo, Inc. Stock: Stable Dividend Powerhouse Amid Institutional Buying and Consumer Staples Resilience
feed.summary: PepsiCo, Inc. (PEP) is highlighted as a stable dividend powerhouse and a defensive investment in the consumer staples sector, especially appealing to North American investors. The company has seen increased institutional interest, robust Q4 earnings that beat analyst expectations, and a validated dividend yield of approximately 3.8%. Strategic initiatives include a share repurchase program and global brand visibility efforts, while key risks involve commodity inflation and competitive pressures.

feed.title: Kroger gives shoppers ways to save on gas in the spring
feed.summary: Kroger announced two upcoming 4X Fuel Points events for spring 2026, taking place from March 27-29 and April 3-5. This initiative allows customers to earn four times the usual Fuel Points on groceries and other eligible purchases, helping them save on fuel during increased spring travel. Shoppers can activate the offer via a digital or in-store coupon, with additional savings available for Boost by Kroger Plus members, gift card purchases, and pharmacy rewards.

feed.title: Canadian Solar Inc Stock: Navigating Solar Energy Expansion and Global Market Dynamics for Investors
feed.summary: Canadian Solar Inc. is a major player in the solar energy sector, focusing on photovoltaic module manufacturing and large-scale project development globally. The company's strategic expansion into North America, supported by manufacturing diversification and advanced technology, positions it well to capitalize on the increasing demand for renewable energy and policy incentives like the U.S. Inflation Reduction Act. However, investors should also consider risks such as market cyclicality, geopolitical tensions, and supply chain fluctuations.

feed.title: Cirrus Logic Shares up 7.2% After Apple Adds
feed.summary: Cirrus Logic (CRUS) shares surged 7.2% following news that Apple (AAPL) is adding the company's components to an additional device. This development implies potential for increased revenue from Apple, a major customer, strengthening Cirrus Logic's market position.

feed.title: CWH Investor Alert: Camping World Holdings, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit – Investors With Losses May Seek to Lead the Class Action After Wagner Allegedly Misrepresented Demand Trends: Levi & Korsinsky
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has filed a securities fraud lawsuit against Matthew D. Wagner, President and CEO of Camping World Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CWH), alleging he misrepresented demand trends, inventory management, and SG&A efficiency between April 29, 2025, and February 24, 2026. This class action comes after CWH shares experienced significant declines following disclosures that contradicted Wagner's public statements. Investors who suffered losses during this period may be eligible to lead the class action, with a lead plaintiff deadline of May 11, 2026.

feed.title: Vanguard disaggregates holdings after realignment (NYSE: CAT)
feed.summary: Vanguard Group has filed an updated Schedule 13G/A for Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE: CAT), indicating zero beneficial ownership after an internal realignment on January 12, 2026. This realignment means certain Vanguard subsidiaries will now report their holdings separately, as permitted by SEC Release No. 34-39538. The filing clarifies that Vanguard itself no longer directly reports aggregated beneficial ownership for Caterpillar shares.

feed.title: The Bull Case For General Electric (GE) Could Change Following Expanded Palantir AI Defense Partnership – Learn Why
feed.summary: GE Aerospace and Palantir Technologies have expanded their multi-year partnership to integrate AI tools across the U.S. Air Force and GE's production system to enhance efficiency and address supply bottlenecks. This collaboration reinforces GE Aerospace's strategy to leverage its installed engine base for recurring service revenue and improve operational efficiency. Investors are closely watching how these AI initiatives and capacity investments will impact GE's growth, profitability, and long-term valuation, with some analysts forecasting significant revenue and earnings increases by 2028.

feed.title: Expanded Opdivo Use and New Camzyos Data Could Be A Game Changer For Bristol Myers Squibb (BMY)
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb (BMY) has announced expanded approvals for its drug Opdivo in Hodgkin lymphoma and new clinical data for Camzyos in obstructive hypertrophic cardiomyopathy, including a successful Phase 3 trial in adolescents. These developments strengthen BMY's position in oncology and cardiovascular care, reinforcing existing growth pillars. While these updates modestly improve the near-term outlook, the company's long-term success hinges on its ability to leverage new launches and its late-stage pipeline to offset looming patent cliffs for key drugs.

feed.title: Best Buy’s Earnings Propel Stock Amid Global Tensions
feed.summary: Best Buy's stock rose by 4.64% following robust holiday sales projections and strong fiscal Q4 adjusted earnings, despite global challenges. The company increased its quarterly dividend and is focusing on high-margin areas like Ads and Marketplace to navigate potential macroeconomic headwinds. Analysts have mixed but largely confident views, with some revising price targets downwards due to anticipated operational challenges while others show optimism.
